description: Key challenging tablets used for manual quality evaluation of the best models (v12a etc.). ATF excerpts for verification.

cases.name: Flood Tablet (Gilgamesh) - Literature, Old Babylonian
cases.note: Long narrative literary text. The best models produced almost perfect translations here.

cases.name: Tiglath-Pileser Royal Inscription - Royal/Monumental
cases.note: Complex royal epithets and formulaic language. Previously a weak point; v12a-style long training made it excellent.

cases.name: Evil Hand Syndrome Tablet - Medicine, Neo-Babylonian
cases.note: Medical/diagnostic. The 28-epoch tag-free model handled specialized terminology well.

cases.name: Simple example from stable training tests
